SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-07-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-07-2026 BY FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF JUNHUA XIE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ORLANDO ZEPEDA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NATALIE YOUNG IS PRESENT WITH DEFENDANT WITNESS, ARIEL BOLANOS, DOG WALKER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XIE, JUNHUA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZEPEDA, ORLANDO YOUNG, NATALIE $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,125.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF V. DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ZEPEDA, ORLANDO YOUNG, NATALIE
